strategy: Raid boss. Hit with your strongest school (no listed resist) and bring a team with a hitter and support.

Every round she stacks two -25% damage and two -50% healing charms on two random wizards. Track them, because at 4+ negative damage or 4+ negative healing charms on any wizard she Storm Owls the whole team then clears all your charms.
Her Storm Owl reset also wipes your blades, so time the hitter's burst to land BEFORE anyone hits the 4-charm threshold, or right after she resets you.
Spread the incoming charms since they hit random wizards, and cleanse damage charms off the hitter before the big hit.
Blade the hitter, Feint the boss, and burst in one round between her Owl resets.
cheatNotes: Each round she piles two -25% damage and two -50% healing charms onto two random wizards, your damage and healing erode fast.

The round any wizard reaches 4+ negative healing or 4+ negative damage charms, she Storm Owls the whole team and strips ALL your charms, blades included. Burst before that threshold or right after the reset.
